testcase.name: test_create_new_version_and_switch
testcase.failure: backend/tests/backend_test.py:224: in test_create_new_version_and_switch assert new_v["version"] == cur_version + 1 E assert 3 == (1 + 1)

testcase.name: test_chat_booking_via_tool

failure.message:
AssertionError: expected create_booking got check_availability reply=Siap Kak Andi, saya bantu booking Deluxe Room untuk 25–26 Agustus 2026, untuk 2 tamu ya.
Siap Kak Andi, Deluxe Room tersedia untuk tanggal 25–26 Agustus 2026. Kalau Kak Andi setuju, saya lanjutkan proses booking ya. assert 'check_availability' == 'create_booking'
- create_booking + check_availability

testcase.failure: backend/tests/backend_test.py:303: in test_chat_booking_via_tool assert d["tool_used"] == "create_booking", f"expected create_booking got {d['tool_used']} reply={d['reply']}" E AssertionError: expected create_booking got check_availability reply=Siap Kak Andi, saya bantu booking Deluxe Room untuk 25–26 Agustus 2026, untuk 2 tamu ya. E E Siap Kak Andi, Deluxe Room tersedia untuk tanggal 25–26 Agustus 2026. Kalau Kak Andi setuju, saya lanjutkan proses booking ya. E assert 'check_availability' == 'create_booking' E E - create_booking E + check_availability
